validate.description: ValidateConfig defines defaults for validation options.

concurrent.description: Concurrent is the number of concurrent validation workers.

fail-fast.description: FailFast exits after the first invalid document.

insecure-skip-tls-verify.description: InsecureSkipTLSVerify disables TLS certificate verification for HTTPS schemas.

output.description: Output selects the command output format.

schema-location.description: SchemaLocations contains schema URLs, file paths, or templates to try in order.

skip-cel-rules.description: SkipCELRules disables evaluation of x-kubernetes-validations CEL rules.

skip-file.description: SkipFiles contains basename glob patterns excluded from validation.

skip-json-path.description: SkipJSONPaths contains JSON Pointers stripped before validation.

skip-kind.description: SkipKinds contains kind or apiVersion/kind patterns excluded from validation.

skip-missing-schemas.description: SkipMissingSchemas skips documents for which no schema can be found.

verbose.description: Verbose prints a line for every document, including valid and skipped documents.

title: ValidateConfig defines defaults for validation options.
